description: Weaken 'sharp phase transition' to 'observed correlation' and clarify relationship to Bourgain-Kontorovich 2014 (which proves density 1 non-effectively for A≤50) and Hensley's conjecture. Our data is consistent with BK14 but we do not prove a phase transition theorem.
